summary: The Eth stream divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in the status-not-in-handshake error return; no handshake behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 149: M	crates/net/eth-wire/src/ethstream.rs.
The isolated patch only changes the StatusNotInHandshake error return to a semicolon-terminated form.
No handshake state check, disconnect behavior, or EthStreamError construction changed.
